title: This site — permanent home, daily writing
description: Portfolio, projects, RAG demos, and articles on my own domain. Blog cadence: near-daily engineering posts. Every shipped system gets a build log.

title: review-rails v1 → GitHub Marketplace
description: Tagged release, marketplace listing, dogfooded on my own repositories. PR review automation your standards can actually enforce.

title: How to Talk Corporate — live at a URL
description: The message-rewriter is live: 10 free rewrites a day, no login, PII stripped before it ever reaches a model. Next: browser extension packaging.

title: ClauseLens to production spec
description: Real embedding model, Postgres + pgvector, hosted rate-limited demo embedded on this site. The blueprint is written; now it gets executed phase by phase.

title: AuditLoom → LedgerScope → BidForge → AuthPilot
description: Four more vertical RAG systems, fully blueprinted (architecture, costs, go-to-market). Sequenced so each build reuses ~60% of the previous one. Details on the systems page.
